title: Cyclone Vardah — Category 4 Landfall at Puri
message: Cyclone Vardah made landfall near Puri with wind speeds of 185 km/h. All coastal areas under red alert.

title: Storm Surge Warning — Puri Coast
message: Storm surge of 3-4 meters expected along Puri-Konark coastline. Move to higher ground immediately.

title: Heavy Rainfall — Cuttack and Bhubaneswar
message: 200mm+ rainfall expected in 24 hours. Flash flooding likely in low-lying areas.

title: Power Outage — Southern Odisha
message: Power supply disrupted in Puri, Ganjam, and Khordha districts. Restoration after storm passes.
